title: Refactoring Plan
description: Lightweight artifact for REFACTORING tasks that skips Vision and Business Analysis. Used when the orchestrator classifies user intent as REFACTORING.

refactoring_title.description: A short descriptive title for the refactoring work.

motivation.description: Why this refactoring is needed (e.g., technical debt, performance, maintainability).

current_state.description: Description of the current code structure with specific file paths and line numbers.

target_state.description: Description of the desired code structure after refactoring.

file_path.description: Relative path to the affected file.

line_range.description: Approximate line range to be refactored, e.g. 'L48-L52'.

change_description.description: What specific change is needed in this file.

affected_files.description: List of files to be refactored with evidence-backed descriptions.

scope_boundaries.description: Explicit out-of-scope declarations to prevent scope creep.

breaking_changes.description: Any breaking changes that other parts of the system need to accommodate.

verification_plan.description: How the refactoring will be verified (e.g., run tests, manual check, build verification).
